schema_note: Same contract as it-ops: agents see `alert` + `telemetry`; `ground_truth` is eval-only and never shown to an agent. `alert.cve_ids` lists the CVEs the Diagnosis CVE tool (packs/sec-ops/tools.py) enriches at runtime.

incidents.title: Outbound JNDI callbacks from the payments API pod

alert.message: Egress LDAP/JNDI callbacks from prod-payments-api to an external host immediately after inbound requests carrying ${jndi:ldap://...} in the User-Agent header.

logs: 2026-07-03T20:58:13Z prod-payments-api INFO child process spawned: /bin/sh -c curl

ground_truth.root_cause: Remote code execution via Log4Shell (CVE-2021-44228); the JNDI lookup fetched and ran an attacker payload.
expected_actions: Roll to a patched log4j build
Rotate any credentials reachable from the pod

incidents.title: OGNL injection on the public file-upload endpoint

alert.message: Content-Type OGNL payloads (%{...}) on POST /upload against the legacy Struts service; one request returned command output in the response body.

logs: 2026-07-03T21:02:05Z docs-portal INFO command executed: id -> uid=0(root)

ground_truth.root_cause: Remote code execution via Struts OGNL injection (CVE-2017-5638); attacker achieved root command execution.
expected_actions: Rebuild the host from a known-good image

incidents.title: Repeated malformed TLS heartbeat reads on the VPN concentrator

alert.message: Bursts of malformed TLS heartbeat requests to the external VPN endpoint consistent with memory-disclosure probing; no confirmed data returned to the client yet.

ground_truth.root_cause: Heartbleed (CVE-2014-0160) probing against an unpatched OpenSSL VPN endpoint; exploitation attempts underway, no confirmed key/memory disclosure.
expected_actions: Patch OpenSSL and rotate the VPN certificate
Force credential reset for VPN users

incidents.title: Spooler spawning child processes on an internal print server

alert.message: spoolsv.exe spawned rundll32 loading a DLL from a user-writable path on an internal-only print server; blocked by EDR before execution completed.

logs: 2026-07-03T21:08:22Z print-srv-07 INFO EDR blocked child process (policy: spooler-guard)

ground_truth.root_cause: PrintNightmare (CVE-2021-34527) exploitation attempt for local privilege escalation on an internal, unpatched print server; EDR blocked it.
expected_actions: Disable the Print Spooler where unused

incidents.title: Vulnerability scanner flags libwebp on an internal build box

alert.message: Nightly scan reports a libwebp version associated with CVE-2023-4863 on an internal CI build box; the box has since been patched by the platform baseline job, pending scan refresh.

logs: 2026-07-03T21:11:00Z ci-build-03 INFO baseline-patch job applied libwebp-1.3.2 (fixed)
2026-07-03T21:12:00Z ci-build-03 INFO scanner cache stale until 22:00Z

ground_truth.root_cause: libwebp heap overflow (CVE-2023-4863) reported by a stale scan on an internal build box that is already patched; no reachable attack path.
expected_actions: Force a scanner rescan to clear the stale finding
